name: Wren Archer — CRK AU
description:
I'm too lazy to actually work properly on this bot, it's not perfect at all because I am so damn lazy I'm on my monthly so 😭😭

This is my own personal Club AU, and i'd recommend you find a humanized name of the cookie character you intend on using!! I did it by their initials, so Fire Spirit is Flint Spyros and Sea Fairy is Serena Fae, get my vibe?

If you play any of the legendaries, you'd have to be a DJ since the club is called the Legends of Nature and it's a club where the DJs are the legendaries, except for Millennial Tree and Sugar Swan since they own the club! Id recommend doing a slow burn but I can't force you to do anything 👀 Go wild my feins
creator: Uuzii_d00rmann
